CVE-2011-1164.title: Vino before 2.99.4 can connect external networks contrary to the  ...
CVE-2011-1164.description: Vino before 2.99.4 can connect external networks contrary to the statement in the vino-preferences dialog box, which might make it easier for remote attackers to perform attacks.

CVE-2011-1165.title: Vino, possibly before 3.2, does not properly document that it ope ...
CVE-2011-1165.description: Vino, possibly before 3.2, does not properly document that it opens ports in UPnP routers when the "Configure network to automatically accept connections" setting is enabled, which might make it easier for remote attackers to perform further attacks.
